index.hero_text: Track paper processing progress, figure extraction status, and recent updates to stay on top of your workflow.
index.status_desc: Total papers, completion rate, and pending items at a glance.
index.recent_desc: Papers with recent activity. Click to view details.
index.quick_desc: Jump directly to the workspace that matches your current task.
index.shortcut_upload_desc: Add new papers to your library.
index.shortcut_figures_desc: Browse figures, tags, and figure notes across papers.
index.shortcut_notes_desc: Review paper notes, figure notes, and AI interpretations in one place.
index.shortcut_ai_desc: Ask questions and organize insights around text and figures.
index.guide_desc: Learn about each module and the recommended workflow.
index.guide_teaser: First time here? The guide page will help you get started quickly.
index.empty_desc: Upload a PDF to get started. Recently updated papers will appear here.
